Environmental Protection.summary: Consistent supporter of climate action and environmental protection legislation including clean energy investments.
voted_for: Inflation Reduction Act with climate provisions (Senate roll call vote, August 2022)
Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act with environmental provisions (Senate roll call vote, August 2021)

Criminal Justice Reform.summary: Supports criminal justice reform including sentencing reform and police accountability measures.
voted_for: First Step Act (Senate roll call vote, December 2018)

Progressive Taxation.summary: Advocates for progressive taxation including higher taxes on wealthy individuals and corporations.
voted_for: Inflation Reduction Act with corporate minimum tax (Senate roll call vote, August 2022)
voted_against: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act of 2017 (Senate roll call vote, December 2017)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Strong supporter of abortion rights and reproductive health access.
voted_for: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, February 2022)
Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, May 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Consistent supporter of LGBTQ+ rights and anti-discrimination protections.
voted_for: Respect for Marriage Act (Senate roll call vote, November 2022)

Public School Funding.summary: Supports increased federal funding for public education.
voted_for: American Rescue Plan Act with education funding (Senate roll call vote, March 2021)
